test-case.description: forwards report flags to the native CLI
test-case.name: Invoke-KubeBuddy wrapper.forwards report flags to the native CLI

test-case.description: defaults to an HTML report when no report flag is provided
test-case.name: Invoke-KubeBuddy wrapper.defaults to an HTML report when no report flag is provided

test-case.description: maps AKS and Prometheus options to native flags
test-case.name: Invoke-KubeBuddy wrapper.maps AKS and Prometheus options to native flags

test-case.description: maps PrometheusCredential to environment variables for basic auth
test-case.name: Invoke-KubeBuddy wrapper.maps PrometheusCredential to environment variables for basic auth

test-case.description: passes through the native tui command
test-case.name: Invoke-KubeBuddy wrapper.passes through the native tui command

test-case.description: passes through the native menu command
test-case.name: Invoke-KubeBuddy wrapper.passes through the native menu command

test-case.description: renames generated reports when outputpath targets a file basename
test-case.name: Invoke-KubeBuddy wrapper.renames generated reports when outputpath targets a file basename

test-case.description: throws when the native CLI exits with a failure code
test-case.name: Invoke-KubeBuddy wrapper.throws when the native CLI exits with a failure code
Invoke-KubeBuddy wrapper.rejects multiple interactive mode switches

test-case.description: prefers the bundled platform binary when present
test-case.name: Resolve-KubeBuddyNativeCommand.prefers the bundled platform binary when present
